name: VOC deep pass (pass-2/3: PMBDE frequency + copy bank + awareness)
_source: PART0 STEP 6 (ingests the winner cell from the NTP pick); ONE-SHOT-SHELL §6 (no gate). writes[0]=voc-bank/_bank.json is the file-grained representative of the voc-bank/ store (consumed by Steps 7 & 8); funnel-vectorize.js = embeddings brick for the slot-scoped bank (MANIFEST-04).
